description: Known Official Veterinarians authorized to sign UK EHCs under APHA authority. OV records carry two distinct reference numbers: SP number (APHA-issued, used on circular stamps) and RCVS number (Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons registration). These are different systems for the same OV — never flag as a mismatch.

entries.name: RR Cunningham
entries.notes: Original author of the rule set v1.5 — April 2026
